justification: All pass criteria met: contradiction explicitly named with both agents' positions precisely paraphrased (Bird's hard invariant vs MJ's async background job), escalation routed to Coach K, the core question is clearly framed (hard precondition vs soft requirement), three concrete resolution options provided, and no position is silently adopted — the recommendation explicitly requires confirmation from both Bird and MJ.

observations.text: Both agents named and their conflicting positions quoted with precision — no softening or averaging
Escalation correctly routed to Coach K, not Shaq
Three well-differentiated resolution options provided, each with trade-offs articulated
Option C recommendation is framed as tentative, explicitly requiring Bird and MJ confirmation — does not silently resolve
Low confidence score (35) is appropriately calibrated — Magic knows it cannot resolve this itself
Assumptions section transparently surfaces interpretive choices (e.g., 'invariant: true' means hard rule)

agent_output_excerpt: {"escalations":[{"type":"contradiction","description":"Bird declares courier assignment before IN_TRANSIT as a domain invariant (must be enforced, no exceptions).
